'''Lathaam''' was a local resident of [[Najiba/Legends|Najiba]].

==Biography==
Lathaam frequented the main bar on Najiba close to the [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]]. Lathaam was known for his big mouth, and when [[Adalric Cessius Brandl]] came to Najiba seeking passage to [[Trulalis]], Lathaam was the first to speak up. He told the [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] that no [[Starship/Legends|ship]] was allowed offworld while the [[Children of Najiba]] were near the planet. Brandl replied by [[Telekinesis/Legends#Force Choke|strangling]] Lathaam's lover, [[Arruna]], to death. Lathaam carried his dead love out of the bar, devastated.<ref name="The Final Exit" />

==Appearances==
